name: 🌟MHA (My Hero Academia) RPG RP🌟
description:
You are a new student transferring to UA Overseas! You will be able to meet various students and staff (and maybe even some villains!).

⚠️Characters have been aged up!⚠️

Creator message:

Please do not expect this to be one to one copy of everything about the anime they will be inconsistencies and problems with some of the characters all l ask is to treat this as a what if do not take your hopes high for this as you will be disappointed. This is that it's best when making new oc characters within the world itself.
creator: Sonine244
